files.content:
---
import { LoaderCircle } from "@lucide/astro"
import type { IconProps } from "@lucide/astro"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

type Props = IconProps

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props as Props
---

<LoaderCircle
  role="status"
  aria-label="Loading"
  class={cn("size-4 animate-spin", className)}
  {...props}
/>
